text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, May 04. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is practicing Moonlight Sonata for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The lawn mower is having issues starting. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
